basic_details.job_title: DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 44 ANM, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Thoothukudi (DHS Thoothukudi) Various Contractual Posts Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://thoothukudi.nic.in. A total of 44 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026 for various contractual positions including Medical Officer, Health Inspector Gr. II, Nursing Assistant, Radiographer, Occupational Therapist, Audiologist and Speech Therapist, and other posts.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits for each post. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree in speech and Language pathology, Diploma in Nursing Therapy, Masters in Hospital Administration/Public Health/Health Management, Must be able to read and write in Tamil, Bachelor’s degree in library and information science, Bachelors/Master’s degree in Occupational Therapy, Recognized Graduate Degree with MS Office, Passed 1 or 2 years course on dental technician, MBBS Degree, B.Com graduate with Tally, Graduate in science or Intermediate in science, Diploma Course in Radio diagnosis Technology, 12th with Biology/Botany/Zoology and Health Inspector Course, Multipurpose Health Worker (F) training course, Diploma in training young deaf and hearing handicapped, Certificate / Diploma Course in Theatre Technician, Certificate of Nursing Assistant Course
qualification.details: Audiologist and Speech Therapist: Bachelor’s degree in speech and Language pathology from any recognized university in India. Therapeutic Assistant (Female): Diploma in Nursing Therapy. District Quality Consultant: Dental/AYUSH/Nursing/Social Science/Life Science graduates with Masters in Hospital Administration/Public Health/Health Management (Full time or equivalent) – with 2 years experiences in Health administration. Desirable training/Experience on NABH/ISO 9001:2008/Six Sigma/Lean/Kaizen would be preferred. Previous work experience in the field of health quality would be an added advantage. Multipurpose Hospital Worker: Must be able to read and write in Tamil. Security Guard: Must be able to read and write in Tamil. Librarian cum Statistician: Bachelor’s degree in B.Sc/B.Com/B.Sc with degree in library and information science with computer knowledge. Occupational Therapist: Bachelors/Master’s degree in Occupational Therapy from a recognized University. Programme cum Administrative Assistant: Recognized Graduate Degree with fluency in MS Office Package with one year experience of managing office and providing support of Health Programme/National Rural Health Mission(NRHM). Knowledge of Accountancy and having drafting skills are required. Dental Technician: Passed 1 or 2 years course on dental technician from a recognized institution. Medical Officer: MBBS Degree awarded by a University or Institution recognized by the UGC for the purpose of its grants. The courses must have been approved by the Medical Council of India. Van Cleaner: Must be able to read and write in Tamil. Account Assistant: B.Com graduate (or) B.A corporate / BCS with minimum experience in maintenance of Accounts. Accounts Assistant should have computer skills and also should be well versed in operating “Tally Package”. Hospital worker: Must be able to read and write in Tamil. TB Health Visitor: Graduate in science OR Intermediate (10+2) in science and experience of working as MPW/LHV/ANM/Health Worker/ Certificate or higher course in Health Education/Counselling OR Tuberculosis health visitor’s recognized course. Certificate course in computer operations (minimum two months). Preferential Qualification: Training course for MPW or recognized Sanitary inspector’s course. Radiographer: Diploma Course in Radio diagnosis Technology (Two years) / Certificate of Radiology Assistant. Health Inspector Gr. II: i) 12th with Biology / Botany and Zoology ii) Must have passed the Tamil language as a subject in SSLC level iii) Must possess two years for Multi-Purpose Health Worker (Male) / Health Inspector /Sanitary Inspector Course training/ offered by recognized private institution / Trust / Universities/Deemed Universities including Gandhigram Rural Institute training course certificate granted by the Director of Public Health and Preventive Medicine. ANM: Multipurpose Health Worker (F) training course/Auxiliary nurse Midwifery training course awarded by DPH&PM. Certificate of registration issued by the TamilNadu Nurses and Midwives council. Audio Metric Assistant: Diploma in training young deaf and hearing handicapped (DTYDHH) from RCI recognized institute to look after the therapy and training of the young hearing impaired children at the District Level. Operation theatre technician: Certificate / Diploma Course in Theatre Technician. Nursing Assistant: Certificate of Nursing Assistant Course.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://thoothukudi.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DHS Thoothukudi Various Contractual Posts is 20-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 44 vacancies announced for various contractual posts in the District Health Society Thoothukudi for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary for each post. They range from 12th pass to MBBS degree, along with specific diploma and degree requirements in various fields like Speech Therapy, Nursing, Hospital Administration, and more.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DHS Thoothukudi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the provided information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the posts ranges from Rs. 6,000/- to Rs. 63,000/- per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities. Detailed salary information is available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Health Society Thoothukudi, which is https://thoothukudi.nic.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these contractual posts?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information on the selection procedure.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for all the recruited positions under this notification is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the District Health Society located in Thoothukudi, Tamil Nadu.
